name: Shrenik Limited
summary: Shrenik Limited engages in the trading and processing of paper, pulp, paperboards, etc. in Gujarat, Rajasthan, and Maharashtra. It offers printing and writing papers, and other specialty papers; and coated paper, uncoated maplitho paper, copier paper, and duplex and folding box boards under the Shrenik Premium Copier Paper and Shrenik Premium Digital Paper brand names. Shrenik Limited was incorporated in 2012 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
